data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding tax rules by service location and customer jurisdiction.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tax rules by service location and customer jurisdiction. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific information or data points that confirm the existence or application of these tax rules. The only relevant evidence pertains to the currency used (USD) and does not address the requirement directly, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of tax rules by service location and customer jurisdiction.
